glean.label: Glean MCP
glean.preflight_prompt: Use the Glean MCP tools to perform a harmless search for the company name and return a one sentence confirmation that retrieval worked.

direct.label: Direct vendor MCPs
direct.preflight_prompt: Use each configured vendor MCP at least once in a harmless read-only way: Slack, Jira/Atlassian, Microsoft, Asana, and Zoom. Return a compact pass/fail table.
